name: Sandboxed Artifact
description: The model writes a complete, free-form HTML document rendered inside a locked-down iframe — allow-scripts without allow-same-origin.
whenToUse: Reach for Open-Ended GenUI when users need genuinely arbitrary, one-off interactive artifacts (a calculator, a mini-game, a bespoke visualization) and you're willing to invest in the strongest sandboxing to make that safe.
